"C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Enterprise\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\InventoryManagementSystem.dir/objects.a
C:\apps\mingw\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\InventoryManagementSystem.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\InventoryManagementSystem.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\apps\mingw\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\InventoryManagementSystem.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o InventoryManagementSystem.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libInventoryManagementSystem.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\InventoryManagementSystem.dir\linkLibs.rsp
